column7:
Advisor Cellphone Number:

Our main method of communication is through email. This phone number is intended for use in urgent/emergency circumstances the day of the conference.
column8:
Names and Contact Information for any additional advisors

Format:
First Last; Email; Phone Number
column9: How large is your Delegation? Changes can be made up until February. Please note there is a limit of 34 delegates per delegation.
column10: Is your school on this list?
column11:
Besides the country you drew in the lottery last year (if you did), how many other countries do you wish to represent in General Assembly. We will assign countries. If you have strong feelings about what countries you want to represent, please contact us via this form.

Delegations that drew in the lottery are limited to 2 more countries. Delegations that didn't participate in the lottery can ask for up to 3.
